# **Indexer Mod**

**Indexer is a mod that helps you organize and manage your items. This automation system allows you to filter and automatically distribute the contents of your Chests / Containers, eliminating the need to manually sort your resources.**

With Indexer, you can deposit all your items in a central point and the system will take care of distributing them to the appropriate containers according to the filters you have configured, saving you time and keeping your base perfectly organized!  
[**GO TO WEB WIKI📖**](https://agustinbeniteez.github.io/Wikimods/mod/index.html?id=indexer&game=minecraft)

***

## ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1301365/description_0e70fd56-4e82-40eb-99c0-acf61d1f28f1.png)
### **![](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/2fec7f23-0b7c-40cd-b630-7ff6facae36a)**
### **Indexer Manager. When you open it, a UI displays all the items connected to the system, allowing you to withdraw them directly into your inventory.**

### ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1301365/description_e378e282-19cb-4a32-854b-efe97858f57f.png)

## **Containers :**

**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1301365/description_04049f06-8ea9-44be-907c-4bd27f4206a2.png)**

## Furnace Compatibility

The system automatically detects furnaces and can refill fuel (coal or charcoal) without additional configuration.\*\*

## ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1301365/description_90a60a5e-41c7-467e-ba24-5e58e4e5076b.png)

## **Extractor Block:**

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1301365/description_19dd8c13-1db3-47c3-8d37-43ac9d942688.png)  

# **Speed Upgrades**

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1301365/description_7d6b049d-b6c3-44b3-be39-b072019f41e9.png)

*   **Basic Upgrade**: Allows the Controller to transfer up to **5** **items** at a time per cycle.
*   **copper Upgrade**: Allows the Controller to transfer up to **10 items** at a time per cycle.
*   **Advanced Upgrade**: Allows the Controller to transfer up to **20 items** at a time per cycle.
*   **Elite Upgrade**: Allows the Controller to transfer up to **64 items** at a time per cycle.
*   **Definitive Upgrade**: Allows the Controller to transfer up to **256 items** at a time per cycle.

## New items Filters to filter by attributes etc...

## ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1301365/description_f3a4bbf0-8727-4b78-a671-971c889bd67a.png)
